trivia_bullets.text: Core Set 2021 (released July 3, 2020) centers on the planeswalker Teferi and reintroduced phasing to Standard for the first time since the Weatherlight era — a 23-year gap. Keen Glidemaster is a common creature in the set's blue contingent, fitting the air-superiority theme that runs through M21's blue commons [Scryfall; Wizards product overview article].
Keen Glidemaster is a first printing — the card has appeared in no other set as of the Scryfall prints database [Scryfall prints_search_uri].

Artist Caroline Gariba is a freelance digital illustrator based in Curitiba, Brazil, working with Wizards of the Coast and Blizzard Entertainment. No Hipsters of the Coast artist-spotlight coverage was found for Gariba as of May 2026 [WebSearch: Hipsters of the Coast site search; carolinegariba.com].

Flavor text: "Fear is a rational response, but waiting won't make it any easier. Just jump!" — speaker unnamed; the line reads as the Glidemaster's own instruction or ethos, delivered mid-leap [Scryfall].

EDHREC rank 28,566 — one of the lowest-ranked cards in the M21 blue commons cohort. The activated flying-grant ability costs {2}{U} per use, making it inefficient in Commander; the 2/1 body for {1}{U} with no intrinsic evasion gives it nothing to offer outside Limited contexts where granting flying to a large attacker can close games [Scryfall EDHREC rank field].
